speaker: speaker1
text: Is there anything worth watching on another channel ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I think there ’ s a Western on .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you mind if we watch it . I ’ d really like to see it .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , I really wanted to see the football game .

speaker: speaker1
text: Football game ? Ok , and you know what comes on next ?

text: I believe there ’ s a sitcom .

text: Are you interested in watching it ?

text: Let me look in the TV Guide first .

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , I am sorry . What's on Channel 2 at 10 pm ?
